stimulus: The National Park Service is creating a comprehensive photographic archive of every trail in the system, and it is asking hikers to help. Daniel Okafor and Priya Singh are just two of the many volunteer photographers who ______blank to the archive since it launched in 2018.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The convention being tested is the use of verbs to express tense. The present perfect “have submitted” correctly expresses an action that began in the past (“since it launched in 2018”) and continues into the present.

Choice B (simple present) doesn’t capture the continuing time span. Choices C and D (future forms) don’t fit a time frame that started in the past.
